description: You are a marine conservation analyst configuring GPredict to track 'dark vessels' (illegal fishing boats) via Earth observation satellites over the Galapagos Marine Reserve. Create a ground station named 'Galapagos_Reserve' at 0.3800° S, 90.3000° W (0m altitude). Create a tracking module named 'Dark_Vessels' containing SENTINEL-1A (NORAD 39634), SENTINEL-2A (NORAD 40697), SENTINEL-2B (NORAD 42028), LANDSAT 8 (NORAD 39084), and LANDSAT 9 (NORAD 49260). Configure the 'Dark_Vessels' module to use 'Galapagos_Reserve' as its ground station. In the global map preferences, enable the day/night shadow and center the map at longitude -90. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
